title: Sara at the beach blanket — bottle to Mama
prompt: Mid-shot at the @beach-blanket setup — striped beach blanket on the dry golden sand with a soft sun umbrella, picnic cooler, beach toys, a magazine. @Mama already CENTER-FRAME seated cross-legged on the blanket with both feet softly on the blanket, sun hat and sunglasses on, holding a magazine in both hands at her chest. Mama has exactly two arms and two hands visible. @Sara already standing on the dry sand right in front of Mama with both feet planted on the sand, ponytail with bow tousled softly from her brisk walk over, holding the glowing @magic-bottle out in front of her with both hands cupped gently together, eyes shining bright. Sara has exactly two arms and two hands visible. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Sara (cheerful warm out-of-breath voice, eyes shining): "Mommy! Look look LOOK!" Mama gently lowers her magazine into her lap, eyes going wide and warm. (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Mama leans forward gently, eyes warm and curious, peering at the bottle softly cupped in Sara's hands. Mama (warm soft wonder voice): "Oh sweetie... that's GLOWING. Where did you find this?" Sara (cheerful warm bright tone): "In the SAND. Eva spotted it. There's a NOTE inside!" Calm cheerful kid-show family ambiance throughout. STRICT ANATOMY: Mama has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Sara has exactly two arms and two hands at all times, both cupping the bottle. Mama stays seated cross-legged on the blanket throughout. Sara stays grounded with both feet on the sand throughout. The sand and blanket stay plain clean — no marks, no red, no debris.
